opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left leg suddenly blew up like a balloon this afternoon, it's throbbing constantly, and it hurts intensely when I try to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on out of nowhere a few hours ago, the calf is swollen and red and I can't put any weight on it — and my mum has had clots in her legs, so I'm really scared.

symptom_narrative.onset: this afternoon, about 6 hours ago — came on suddenly
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and it's been getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a constant deep throbbing ache; the calf is swollen, tight, warm and looks red
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I can't stand on it or walk
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my left calf and lower leg
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; resting on the couch takes the edge off a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up or putting any weight on the leg
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no chest pain and no trouble breathing at the moment
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: stuck on the couch, can't bear weight on the left leg

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a new combined contraceptive pill I started about three weeks ago

family_history_as_reported.narrative: My mum has had several blood clots in her legs over the years.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: 22 years old, lives at home; no recent long flights, travel, injury or surgery. Very worried because of her mother's history of clots.

objective_data_offered.value: left calf looks clearly bigger than the right, red/flushed over the skin, and she says it feels warm and tight to touch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video impression only; no clinician measurement or examination

objective_data_offered.value: she does not feel feverish and hasn't checked her temperature; no chest pain or shortness of breath right now
an empty blister pack of her contraceptive pill is on the bedside table
